title: Meme Soundboard
description: Adds meme sounds for Voice Chat Soundboard
body:
Adds meme sounds for [Voicechat Soundboard](https://modrinth.com/mod/voicechat-soundboard).

Full sound list:
- Airhorn
- Ba Dum Tss
- Crickets
- Fortnite Death
- GET OUT!
- HOG RIDER!
- Indian Music
- Metal Pipe
- Sad Violin
- AAAHHH!
- Vine Boom
- Your Phone Ringing

If you want more sounds, please [open an issue on Github](https://github.com/Thijzert123/meme-soundboard/issues).
